task_description: Rewrite dashboard-builder.ts to produce HTML output matching the reference dashboard at dash.shopinzo.bond, with gzip+base64 data payload, full CSS design system, charts, filters, tables, modals, and client-side JS. Then deploy and test.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly (no source file errors). All 69 tests pass. Docker compose build completed on VPS. Test run triggered. Output HTML is ~35KB (under 60KB limit). Review issues addressed: XSS in sheetUrl fixed with JSON.stringify, carrier field populated from tracking data, funnel_url and UTM fields populated from raw lead data.
